findings.title: Successful login after repeated failures
findings.description: User deploy had 4 failed attempts from 198.51.100.77 before a successful login.

May 21 03:26:16 web-01 sshd[2134]: Accepted password for deploy from 198.51.100.77 port 50105 ssh2

findings.title: Possible SSH brute-force attack
findings.description: 9 failed authentication attempts from 203.0.113.50 within 10 minutes.

May 21 02:10:25 web-01 sshd[2012]: Failed password for invalid user admin from 203.0.113.50 port 41101 ssh2

May 21 02:13:05 web-01 sshd[2018]: Failed password for root from 203.0.113.50 port 41105 ssh2
